articles.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Consolidate Gains, Altcoins in Green
articles.description: Bitcoin price gained pace after it broke the USD 22,500 resistance and climbed above the USD 23,000 level before the bears appeared near USD 23,450. It is currently (11:44 UTC) consolidating gains near the USD 23,000 level and is up 8% in a day and down 1% in a week. Similarly, most major altcoins are consolidating gains. ETH corrected lower from the USD 1,675 resistance. XRP is trading...

articles.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Clones Jump on Market Bounce
articles.description: Cryptocurrencies surged across the board Thursday, with the total crypto market gaining 7.1% on the day. Old forked coins of the industrys most established networks are leading the way. articles.title: Cardano Leading Bitcoin, Ethereum, Polkadot and Two Altcoins in One Metric: Analytics Firm Santiment
articles.description: Crypto analytics firm Santiment is highlighting the continued growth of decentralized blockchain platform Cardano (ADA) as it outpaces several key competitors. According to a new post, the data aggregator showcases Cardano’s impressive number of GitHub repositories compared to lower numbers from layer-1 developer tool Flow (FLOW), cross-chain interoperability protocol Polkadot (DOT) and its...
